title: Recipe Conflict Resolver
description: This mod adds a simple button to easily switch between recipes that share the same ingredients.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6HrH4D1E/images/abedc3ecb8753714b4f85d3151b2cc09aa12788a.gif)

**[Aquarius Libs](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquarius-libs) needs to be installed for this mod to work!**

 

Tired of recipe conflicts when multiple mods share the exact same crafting ingredients?

This mod adds a simple button to easily cycle through conflicting outputs and get the exact item you need.

(Its also kinda like a library mod as my future item mods will need it most likely, because of the recipe conflicts)

 ---

What It Does
- **Conflict Button:** If two mods use the same recipe, a button pops up right next to the item output box.
- **Click to Swap:** Just click the button or the output box to cycle through the different item results.
- **Handy Tooltips:** Hover over the button to see your current choice (like 1/3) and see exactly what item is coming up next.
- **Where It Works:** Works perfectly in Crafting Tables, Player Inventories, and Smithing Tables.
- **Furnace Support:** It also works in Furnaces, Blast Furnaces, and Smokers (though fixing the underlying mod conflicts is recommended for smelting).
 
---

Supported Versions
- **Loaders:** Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge.
- **Versions:** 26.1.x
- _Note: No plans to support older versions below 26.1 for now!_

 ---

Found a Bug?
If you encounter any **bugs** or experience a **crash**, please **send** the **crash log** directly to me via **[curseforge private message](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aleni26/projects)** so I can look into it.
